description: VERIFIED LIVE: The Guardian via content-script DOM extraction — no login, no API key. The Guardian tags every story link with data-link-name="article", so this tool reads the headlines straight from the DOM of your open Guardian tab. Navigate the tab to the front page or any section (theguardian.com/international, /world, /technology, …) and call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code: 30 stories with headline and article url extracted correctly.

tools.name: guardian_headlines
tools.description: Story links on the current Guardian page (front page or any section/topic). Navigate the tab there first. Returns each story's headline and article url. VERIFIED (30 stories).
